column12: DESCRIPTION
Maomao and Xiaolan first meet, Maomao reads something for Xiaolan.
Xiaolan gossips to Maomao during lunch and work.
Lihua accuses Gyokuyou of cursing her child and slaps her. Gyokuyou wants the docter to examine her child too.
Jinshi meets Maomao
Jinshi introduces Maomao & Gyokuyou, Gyokuyou thanks Maomao for saving her child's life.
Gyokuyou hires Maomao.
Jinshi tries to seduce Maomao to keep her in check.
Maomao's first shift as Gyokuyou's poison taster.
Jinshi tries to seduce Maomao again and fails again.
Jinshi asks Maomao advice about a poisoning case, he then asks her to make aphrodisiacs.
Maomao introduces Gyokuyou to chocolate
Gyokuyou suggests Maomao to make some chocolate for the emperor.
Jinshi annoys Maomao, still maybe trying to seduce her.
Xiaolan tells Maomao about the ghost lady rumor in the rear palace.
Maomao realizes that Jinshi is a high ranking eunuch and theorizes that he's the Emperor's favourite.
Jinshi asks Maomao for help on the sleepwalking case very persistently.
Maomao asks Xiaolan about the ghost/sleepwalking story.
Maomao explains the ghost lady situation to Gyokuyou.
Gyokuyou asks Maomao for the full story about the sleepwalking. Maomao obliges.
The Emperor tells Gyokuyou that he has a request for Maomao/the apothecary.
The Emperor requests Maoamo to help cure Lihua.
Maomao and Xiaolan gossip over lunch. Xiaolan calls Maomao awesome.
Jinshi helps Maomao get past the ladies in waiting to help Lihua.
Jinshi watches Maomao beat her up and is like wow.
Jinshi asks if there's anything Maomao needs, Maomao asks for a steam bath for Lihua, Jinshi immediately says yes.
Lihua asks why Maomao didn't let her die, and Maomao makes her realize she wants to live.
Lihua pets Maomao's head while she sleeps.
Maomao reassures Lihua that the Emperor still holds affection for her, and then tells her about a secret technique.
Maomao shares snacks with xiolan over gossip.
Jinshi asks Maomao questions about the colored flame incident, and also about her mushrooms much to her dismay.
Gyokuyou helps Maomao dress up appropriately for the garden party
Jinshi requests Maomao to make hand warmers for him as well
Gyokuyou gives Maomao jewellry representing her servitude to her
Jinshi sees Maomao dressed up for the first time. She explains her lack of freckles. He gives her his hair pin.
Lihaku (military officer) gives Maomao a hairpin.
Lihua gives Maomao a hairpin.
Jinshi helps Maomao after she gets poisoned.
Maomao also helps solve the beginning of the poisoning mystery.
Gyokuyou is worried about Maomao.
Xiaolan tells Maomao about using the hairpins to leave the rear palace temporarily.
Maomao makes a deal to bring Lihaku to the Verdigrus House if he vouches for her to visit home.
Jinshi gets jealous over Maomao leaving the rear palace with Lihaku. Maomao creates a misunderstanding about her and Lihaku.
Gyokuyou is amused at the misunderstadning that Maomao accidentally created.
Gyokuyou laughs and explains the misundertanding between him and Maomao to Jinshi.
Jinshi asks Maomao to investigate the drinking man's death.
Jinshi gives Maomao a reward of alcohol. Maomao and Jinshi tease each other.
Maomao gives her report on drowned woman. Her and Jinshi have a little conversation on the psychology of dying. Maomao asks to die by poison if she is to be executed.
Xiaolan gossips to Maomao during lunch about the drowned woman. Maomao gives her some food for the tea party.
Jinshi gives Maomao a new task to infiltrate the Garnet Pavilion.
Maomao reports her findings to Jinshi. Jinshi tries to feed honey to Maomao.
Maomao downplays her role to Jinshi in solving the Garnet Pavillion case to lay low.
A drunk Jinshi holds Maomao for comfort. Maomao allows it once she sees him crying.
Xiaolan gossips with Maomao during lunch again.
Jinshi fires Maomao, thinking that's what she wants. Little does he know, she wanted to stay.

Maomao meets Jinshi while working for the Verdigris House. Jinshi offers to buy her out and Maomao expresses that she wants to work at the rear palace again. Misunderstandings are cleared up. Jinshi does an indirect kiss.
Jinshi buys out Maomao and gifts her a medicinal herb.
Emperor and Jinshi talk and enjoy a drink together.
Jinshi officially collects Maomao, and blushes as she's all dressed up. He gets jealous over others admiring her.
Jinshi tells Maomao she has to prepare for life in the outer court. He tells her to prepare for the court lady exam.
Jinshi watches as Maomao deals with people harrassing her. He also asks her about her studying.
Jinshi tells Maomao she failed the exam, and now Maomao is officially one of his personal servants.
Lakan secretly watches Maomao look at the plants on his property.
Jinshi informs Maomao she is needed for a job back in the rear palace
Maomao tries to take advantage of Jinshi by changing the invoice and hiding the teaching material
Maomao teaches Gyokuyou how to please the emperor
Maomao teaches Lihua how to please the emperor
Maomao teaches Loulan how to please the emperor. Loulan ignores her.
Jinshi gets jealous over Maomao thanking Gaoshun for giving her the coat instead of him.
Maomao helps Lihaku investigate the fire in the storage shed
Jinshi is interested in what Maomao and Gaoshun are talking about, and then she runs off away from him.
Jinshi shows up to follow up on Maomao's investigation of the dead bureaucrat. Maomao eats the discovered poison and Jinshi makes her throw it up.
Maomao greets Jinshi happily while daydreaming about medicine. Jinshi bashes his head against the wall.
Jinshi explains his troubles with a higher military official to Maomao.
Lakan visits Jinshi to talk and mess with him
Jinshi reluctantly gives Maomao the 3 brothers mystery, which she's actually excited to solve.
Turns out Lakan introduced the 3 brothers mystery. Lakan gives Jinshi a question to ask Maomao.
Jinshi asks Maomao to do his makeup to help him go undercover to find something out.
Maomao helps Jinshi with his makeup to pretend to be a commoner.
Jinshi in turn helps Maomao with her disguise as a more affluent person. She is a noble he is he servant both in disguise.
Maomao shows Jinshi around in the town marketplace. The eat some chicken skewers and have a good time window shopping around.
Maomao and Jinshi have a deep conversation before they part ways into the town about her dad and stuff. Jinshi asks Maomao an unpleasant question.
Jinshi gives Maomao and Suiren a teapot and then watches Maomao do chores, almost longingly.
Lakan tries to blackmail Jinshi, requesting an audience with Maomao. Jinshi's unsure.
Jinshi mentions to Maomao about her meeting Lakan. Maomao does a scary face at the thought and Jinshi backtracks, saying he'll deny Lakan's request.
Lihaku asks Maomao for help regarding a thievery during the warehouse fire.
Jinshi is jealous over Maomao and Lihaku.
Maomao explains the situation to Jinshi. Jinshi offers Maomao a reward to investigate.
Lakan gets the guard to let Maomao into the ceremony.
Maomao saves Jinshi from being crushed in the ceremony, getting injured in the process.
Jinshi worries over Maomao and carries her back to his home to rest and heal after she passes out.
Maomao explains how she came to the conclusion that a trap was set during the ceremony.
Maomao requests to see Suirei's body. Jinshi obligues. They learn of the resurrection medicine. Maomao evil laughs.
Jinshi assigns Maomao to work in the Jade Palace again, because Gyokuyou's likely pregnant.
Lihaku asks Maomao how much it would be to buy Pairin from the Verdigris house. Maomao observes his body to see if he's Pairin's type.
Jinshi walks in on Lihaku semi naked with Maomao. Jealous Jinshi occurs.
Out of jealousy, Jinshi offers to give Lihaku the money to buy out Pairin. Lihaku refuses, which raises Jinshi's opinion of him.
Maomao is drawing and playing with Gyokuyou's daughter as pregnant Gyokuyou watches.
Lakan gives Jinshi an impossible task of creating blue roses.
Jinshi asks Maomao if she can get/make the blue roses. Maomao hears him out to help him and to get back at Lakan.
Maomao asks Lihua for permission to use the steam room and maomao gives her the emperors favorite book.
Maomao shows Jinshi the greenhouse and explains how she aims to achieve the blue roses.
Xiaolan arrives to help Maomao on her quest for the blue roses. They also enjoy their breaks together like old times Xiaolan shows Maomao. her manicure.
Maomao presents the blue roses to Jinshi at the garden party clearly tired from the work.
Jinshi presents the blue roses to the emperor at the garden party.
Jinshi meets Maomao after the garden party with a single blue rose. He thanks her for the work and she explains how she did it.

Lakan meets his daughter Maomao for the first time face to face. They play a game of shogi with a bet that if she wins he will buy a courtesan from house Verdigris. Maomao wins, which sets in motion for what she wants.
Jinshi watches their game closely and is worried about Maomao and the bet.
Maomao returns home and explains the whole situation with Lakan and her mother.
Jinshi and Maomao have a heart-to-heart atop the inner wall. Jinshi worries over Maomao's leg and carries her back home.
Jinshi checks up on Maomao, and brings her a new task. Maomao is now eager to complete tasks.
Maomao is making scented oils, Jinshi walks in because he wants to see her. They have a nice conversation before a package arrives.
A package arrives for Maomao that she tries to hide from Jinshi. Jinshi and Gaoshun confiscate the books that Maomao ordered.
Maomao has been ordering books for the Emperor.
Xiaolan tells Maomao about a novel she likes during lunch.
Xiaolan asks Maomao to teach her how to read. Maomao is very proud of her. The lessons begin.
Gyokuyou asks Maomao to look after Lingli and teach her about plants while she explores.
Maomao and Shisui meet after chasing a cat. Shisui catches the cat for her.
Jinshi checks up on Maomao and the cat. Jinshi realizes how much Maomao acts like a cat and now understands the appeal of cats.
Maomao and Xiaolan overlook the caravan of merchants arriving and talk. Xiaolan invites Maomao to join her on the last caravan day.
Maomao warns Gyokuyou about how the caravan seems to know about her pregnancy.
Maomao and Xiaolan visit the markets and do some shopping. Maomao buys hair ties for Xiaolan. They and Shisui have tea.
We see Shisui and Xiaolan together for the first time at the markets. They're already friends. They and Maomao have tea.
Maomao and Shisui bond over bugs and plants.
Jinshi scolds Maomao for a sniffing people. Maomao tells Jinshi about the scented goods sold by the merchants being used for abortions.
Maomao tells Gyokuyou about the scented goods sold by the merchants being used for abortions.
Jinshi visits Maomao in the kitchen and tries to share tea with her. Maomao thinks she messed up.
Jinshi consults Maomao on plans for a school. Jinshi asks her to investigate and dispose of mushrooms.
Maomao shows Jinshi a very poisonous mushroom. Jinshi learns of her self-experiment hobbies. Jinshi gives her what she needs to solve the mushroom mystery. Maomao explains the mystery to him.
Jinshi and Gaoshun confiscate Maomao's mushrooms.
Gyokuyou shows Maomao the mirror.
Jinshi asks Maomao for help in finding the Moon Fairy. It's the granny. They learn the secret of the Moon Fairy from granny.
Maomao suggests that Jinshi acts as the Moon Fairy, much to Jinshi's annoyance.
Shisui says hi to Maomao. Maomao gets the idea to use moths for the Moon Fairy, and enlists Shisui to help.
Jinshi, Maomao, and Gaoshun debrief after the Moon Fairy event. Jinshi pouts and Maomao dries his hair.
Xiaolan meets Maomao to tell her shes going to school for the first time. Maomao wishes her luck.
Jinshi and Maomao run into each other and talk about the clinic. Jinshi warns Maomao about how only men can legally be doctors.
Gyokuyou is worried about people finding out that Maomao makes medicine, the clinic lady wants to meet Maomao.
Maomao reveals her findings to Lihua, that her head lady in waiting is planning to sabotage and poison Lihua and/or Gyokuyou.
Jinshi weighs in as Maomao reveals the findings of her investigation. Lihua's head lady in waiting is planning to sabotage and poison her and/or Gyokuyou.
Jinshi gives Maomao his hankerchief to clean her injured face. Maomao and Jinshi discuss what the perfume event means for the rear palace.
Lihua and the Emperor spend the night. They talk a bit about Maomao.
Jinshi and Maomao discuss the school initiative and how they can do better.
Maomao talks to Xiaolan about her progress in school. They talk with Xiaolan's teacher.
Maomao tastes the food for poison for the Emperor and Gyokuyou.
Emperor and Gyokuyou enjoy dinner together with their daughter.
Maomao tastes the food for poison for the Emperor and Gyokuyou.
The Emperor goes through the Shrine of choosing with the help of Maomao. He seems quite impressed with Maomao.
Jinshi and Maomao both accompany the Emperor through the shrine of choosing. Maomao accompanies Jinshi in the second try, and the Emperor follows them.

Jinshi and the Emperor both see Maomao positively as she helps them through the Shrine of choosing and the Emperor has a good laugh. The Emperor suggests Jinshi and Maomao go through the Shrine of Choosing together.
Maomao asks Xiaolan if shes seen Shisui during lunch.
Maomao finds Shisui in the forest. She accidentally kills a bug on Maomao's head. She then talks about bugs Maomao is not interested. They talk about the Emperess Dowager.
Jinshi watches as Maomao explains how she solved the case of why the previous emperor's body is still intact.
Gyukuyou lets Maomao continue using the shed, and sleep in her old room.
Maomao and Shisui listen to and tell ghost stories in a group. They survive what is essentially an attempted murder. They discuss the truths surrounding some of the ghost stories.
Jinshi tells Maomao he needs her to come with him for a hunting trip. Jinshi tries to explain what's happening.
Gyokuyou and Jinshi fight over Maomao. She teases him over not being able to call Maomao by her name.
Maomao tastes tests Jinshi's food. Jinshi doesn't eat it since it has aphrodesiac properties. Maomao's built different.
Maomao meets Lihaku on the hunting trip as he's playing with a dog. He's one of the guards on the trip.
Jinshi has heat stroke. Maomao runs after him to help him.

Jinshi tries to tell Maomao something, but is interrupted by gunshots. Jinshi saves Maomao and they jump off a waterfall. Jinshi resucitates Maomao. They wring out their clothes together and eat snacks while they theorize.
Maomao and Jinshi find an exit that they can't reach. Maomao stands on Jinshi's shoulders but a frog makes her slip. Maomao lands on Jinshi in a compromising position.

Maomao accidently fondles him after landing on him, realizing that he's not actually a eunuch. Maomao refuses to let him explain, calling it a frog in an attempt to remain purposely ignorant. This sets Jinshi off, leading to teasing between the two of them. Maomao realizes in embarrassment that she provoked him too much when he pins her to the floor and tries to kiss her before being interrupted by Lihaku and the dog. Just an embarrassing/awkward situation all around.
Lihaku pulls Maomao and Jinshi out of the cave. They explain the gun situation to him. They all enact a plan to successfully find the culprits.
Lihaku pulls Maomao and Jinshi out of the cave. They explain the gun situation to him. They all enact a plan to successfully find the culprits.
Maomao and Jinshi apologize for the earlier episode events. Maomao vows to keep his secret. Jinshi gives Maomao a rare medicine again.
Jinshi tries to tell Maomao his true identity. Maomao gets distracted by the ox beozar and doesn't listen to keep out of trouble.
Xiaolan asks Maomao if she has any connections to help her get a job. Maomao, Xiaolan and Shisui hang out together. They look for connections with concubines in the bathhouse by giving out massages.
Xiaolan asks Shisui if she knows any places that are hiring? Maomao, Xiaolan and Shisui hang out together. They look for connections with concubines in the bathhouse by giving out massages.
Maomao, Xiaolan and Shisui hang out together. They look for connections with concubines in the bathhouse by giving out massages.
Gyokuyou give Maomao permission to give massages at the bathhouse to other concubines in order to gather gossip.
Xiaolan, Maomao and Shisui talk about the new eunuchs.
Xiaolan tells Shisui about the new eunuch that shes heard about.
Xiaolan, Maomao and Shisui talk about the new eunuchs.
Jinshi assigns Maomao to solve Lishu's ghost problem. Maomao vows to keep her lips sealed about the incident.
Jinshi and Gyokuyou fight over Maomao again. Gyokuyou is surprised over Jinshi calling Maomao by name and accepts easier this time.
Jinshi and Maomao solve Lishu's ghost problem. They both don't like Lishu's head lady-in-waiting.

Maomao steps in to helps Xiaolan after she's bumps a person carrying ice for a high ranking concubine. She takes the blame even though she's not involved, this could have serious consequences. Ice is rare and expensive could buy a person with it. XIolan is crying while Maomao thinks of a solution.
Maomao asks Jinshi for some help and if she can use the kitchen and ingredients. He asks her to wear the hairstick he gave her in return.
Maomao and Xiaolan use the ice and ingredients from the kitchen to make an ice treat as a replacement for the high ranking concubine Loulan so no one gets in trouble.
Shisui, Maomao and Xiaolan all taste and eat the ice treat together since they made more than needed.
Shisui, Maomao and Xiaolan all taste and eat the ice treat together since they made more than needed.
Shisui, Maomao and Xiaolan all taste and eat the ice treat together since they made more than needed.

Maomao checks up on the pregnant Gyokuyou, and says that there might be a danger that the child in her belly is upside down which could lead to birth complications. She suggests bringing in an experienced doctor, which ends up being Luomen.
Shisui is held at knifepoint and Maomao has to follow the kidnappers, one being Suirei, to keep her safe.
Jinshi and Gyokuyou discuss the disappearance of Maomao. They try to gather intelligence on her whereabouts or what might have happened.
Jinshi shows Gyokuyou the note that he found hidden in a tree left behind by Maomao, they figure out the clue. He looks for the servant girl Shisui.
Maomao and Shisui are tied uheld prisoner on a boat, and wonder where Surei is taking them. Small flashback to the hidden tunnel they used to escape from the palace.
After they get off the boat and are walking Maomao proves a theory by throwing a snake at Suirei. Shisui helps Suirei, showing her true allegiance.
They arrive at their home base/village. Shisui shows Maomao around and introduces her to her friends there.
Jinshi visits Gyokuyou as shes in labor. He's still thinking about Maomao.
Shisui takes Maomao along for a village festival. They participate in the traditions by eating skewers and grilled insects, and by burning the masks in the fire.
Shisui feeds and takes care of Maomao while she's absorbed with researching the resurrection medicine. She comments on Maomao's hairpin given by Jinshi.

Maomao gets caught snooping around in the shed where the kidnappers build their feifas. Loulan helps Maomao by stating she would be useful for her skills as an apothecary and lying about her accomplishments. Maomao is brought to the stronghold. Maomao realizes that the true identity of Concubine Loulan is Shisui.

Lakan barges into Jinshi's office, calls him a coward for not having found his daughter yet, and demands him to take action using his rightful position as a prince to take an army to the enemys stronghold and get Maomao back. Luomen shows up to calm the situation and softly scold Lakan.

Lakan on his knees pleads to Jinshi to rally an army to defeat Shishou the traitor and bring back Maomao. Lakan encourages Jinshi, making an official request for him to take his role as the Moon Prince.

Maomao takes the fall for another incident protecting the kid. Loulan, knowing Maomao's poison immunity and expertise, helps her avoid getting thrown in the cold, winter water, by suggesting to Shenmei that they should throw her in with the snakes instead.

Jinshi's army approaches the stronghold. As Loulan/Shisui blows up the gunpowder storage, Maomao runs into her. Loulan tells Maomao to evacuate but she instead follows her. Loulan reveals her backstory, and how she made the kids drink poison before the army attacked, seemingly to give them a painless death.

Loulan explains how she never intended for Maomao to meet her evil mother Shenmei, and for things to go so far. Maomao tries to help Shisui, reaching out to her, but Loulan won't retreat. Maomao gives Shisui Jinshi's hair pin, and asks her to return it someday.

As the army is preparing in the snowy mountains Lakan explains that if Jinshi was even a little late he would have dragged him out physically. They go over the plan to take the stronghold. Lakan exaclaims to himself just wait Maomao, Papas coming to save you!

Lihaku explains to Jinshi that its dangerous and he should stay outside the stronghold for his protection. Jinshi explains to him that Maomao is held captive here, and that she's Lakan's daughter. Lihaku now realizes that Jinshi needs to do everything he can to avoid making another political enemy.

Jinshi breaks into the room Maomao is in. Maomao asks him to protect her and realizes how much she missed talking to him. Maomao fully accepts his true identity as the prince. Jinshi continues on with the battle and leaves Lihaku to protect Maomao.

Lihaku confirms that Maomao and Lakan's daughter are the same person, and questions what Maomao's doing here. Lihaku fulfills her wish to get the kids out to give them a proper burial. Lihaku begins to escort her out.

Loulan holds Jinshi at gunpoint and asks him to follow her. He chooses to oblige. She explains the plot of her evil mother and the Shi Clan. Her mother tries to shoot her but it backfires on her. Loulan asks Jinshi to spare those who have died once, and she adds a scar to his face.
Loulan dances as part of her act, waiting to die. Jinshi watches, knowing she needs to die even though she had been the one to root out the evil in the Empire. Loulan is shot off the roof.

Jinshi checks up on Maoamo. Maomao takes a look at the injury on Jinshi's face. Jinshi delivers news of Shisui's death. Jinshi wants to rest with Maomao. Maomao tells Jinshi that he'd look good with more scars, and that he looks more manly. Jinshi almost kisses Maomao, before she notices the supposedly dead kids waking up. Jinshi asks her to continue another time and she says yes while distracted.
Maomao reads a letter that Xiaolan left for her. Xiaolan has left the rear palace for more work. Maomao sheds a tear.

Jinshi stops Maomao as she's about to comedically cut off her pinky. Jinshi visits and updates Maomao on the aftermath. Maomao tells Jinshi what happened to his hairstick. Jinshi bites Maomao's neck and asks her to pick up where they left off. It looks like they're about to, before the kid cockblocks Jinshi. Maomao asks him to rest, Jinshi chooses to rest while using her lap as his pillow and she lets him. Jinshi naps on Maomao.
